text:
The automated checker's "author mismatch" flagging of "Z. Q. J. Lu" is explained by the Amazon result: Z. Q. John Lu was the *reviewer* of the book in *Technometrics* (Vol. 49(2), 2007), not the author. The actual book by Ferraty and Vieu is definitively real and well-documented across multiple authoritative sources.

VERDICT: UNLIKELY
EXPLANATION: The book "Nonparametric Functional Data Analysis: Theory and Practice" by Frédéric Ferraty and Philippe Vieu was published by Springer in 2006 and is confirmed on Springer's own website, Google Books, Amazon, and the ACM Digital Library. The automated checker's "author mismatch" (Z. Q. J. Lu / Technometrics) refers to a book *review* published in Technometrics in 2007, not to the book's actual authorship.
LINK: https://link.springer.com/book/10.1007/0-387-36620-2
